_comment: section-11 v3.106 regression: intervals.icu auto-generates a single RECOVERY placeholder segment for unstructured rides. Pre-fix, has_intervals returned true for any non-empty icu_intervals; that classified plain rides as structured workouts and contaminated F8/F9/F10 tests. F11's isStructuredWorkout MUST require at least one segment with type === 'WORK' to pass for this fixture; otherwise this regression returns.
